taskDefinitionArn.title: Task Definition ARN
taskDefinitionArn.description: The full ARN of the task definition

family.title: Family
family.description: The family name of the task definition

revision.title: Revision
revision.description: The revision number of the task definition

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the task definition

containerDefinitions.title: Container Definitions
containerDefinitions.description: The container definitions that describe the containers in the task

cpu.title: CPU
cpu.description: The number of CPU units used by the task (e.g. 256, 512, 1024)

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: The amount of memory (in MiB) used by the task (e.g. 512, 1024, 2048)

networkMode.title: Network Mode
networkMode.description: The Docker networking mode to use for the containers

requiresCompatibilities.title: Requires Compatibilities
requiresCompatibilities.description: The task launch types the task definition was validated against

taskRoleArn.title: Task Role ARN
taskRoleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that grants containers permission to call AWS APIs

executionRoleArn.title: Execution Role ARN
executionRoleArn.description: The ARN of the task execution IAM role

volumes.title: Volumes
volumes.description: The list of data volume definitions for the task

placementConstraints.title: Placement Constraints
placementConstraints.description: The placement constraint objects to use for tasks

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: The tags associated with the task definition

registeredAt.title: Registered At
registeredAt.description: The timestamp when the task definition was registered
